alkylation reagent: After this, iodoacetamide was added to a final concentration of 15 mM
alkylation concentration: iodoacetamide was added to a final concentration of 15 mM
cleavage agent: 0.5 μg of sequencing grade trypsin (Promega) was added to each sample
fragmentation method: Precursor ions were fragmented by HCD using stepped relative collision energies
instrument: for analysis in a Orbitrap Exploris 480 (Thermo Scientific)
labeling: TMT reagents were resuspended in acetonitrile at 25 μg/μl
